message:
refactor(mux): improve domain lifecycle management and sort imports

Overhaul Mux::add_domain() to properly handle domain replacement and
add TmuxDomain awareness, plus alphabetize imports across all mux
modules:

- lib.rs: Rewrite add_domain() to detect and replace existing domains
  by name, removing stale domain IDs from the domains map; add
  remove_domain() for explicit domain removal with subscriber
  notification; import TmuxDomain for tmux-specific domain handling;
  add domain_replaced subscription event
- localpane.rs: Add get_domain_id() accessor for local pane domain
  tracking
- 12 files (client, connui, domain, events, pane, ssh, ssh_agent,
  tab, termwiztermtab, tmux, tmux_commands, tmux_pty): Alphabetize
  import statements per rustfmt convention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
